description: This pipeline removes columns from a table using 'table-remove-columns' nodes, specifically '701a132e-ff87-4fab-8387-319a09be8f55', '19227715-1b69-4a0a-983a-5c475a8780ec', and '167863ae-c201-4046-a389-ea0e1bf83059'. The pipeline starts with '701a132e-ff87-4fab-8387-319a09be8f55' and ends with '167863ae-c201-4046-a389-ea0e1bf83059'.

253de2ac-c529-4c20-ac13-284d96d53de6.name: iji-export-table-v2
253de2ac-c529-4c20-ac13-284d96d53de6.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

87749105-9808-4a32-8646-f5ca0e4d2eb4.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

ad46b839-a770-4891-bb66-13b3eb5cd76a.description: Executes a Python-script for each table. Each table is passed as dictionary 'table' with the column name as key and values being an array of strings or doubles. The number of input rows can be accessed via the 'nrow' variable.
